Maisura

Maisura Mahabub Luba

Often known as 'Lebu'. She is the OG of the group. She mothers us and takes good care of her children. Apparently, I discovered her way later than I should have had but anyway she is mine now. She is indescribably beautiful and kind of person that poets write about. And I love her, So this is a tiny description of who she is.

Nusrat Islam

Often known as 'Shikkhito Apa'. She is the genius of all. She has a good heart and a brilliant brain. She has not learnt to give up. She is the most hardworking person I have ever met.

Sadia Prionti

She is the model of the group. Her beauty is inside out, has always been a great friend to me. Introduced me to many cool things and she is a cool kid. I love swiftie friends.

Madiha Farzana

Often known as 'Catto'. She is a cute girl and I am her mother. She accidentally died 3 years ago and I had a breakdown that time but she has come to life now. So now this is all fine.
